name: Shrimp and Scallop Pasta with Cognac
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup fresh tarragon or parsley or rosemary, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saute pan, combine the wine, garlic, and herbs. Bring to a simmer.
2. Add the cognac and butter. Continue to simmer until the sauce is reduced by half.
3. Add the shrimp and scallops to the sauce. Stir well and cook for 2 - 4 minutes until the shrimp are cooked through.
4. Meanwhile, cook the pasta according to package directions.
5. Arrange the shrimp and scallops over the pasta on each plate.
6. Spoon the sauce over each serving.
